content:
📜 Buff/Debuff Effects Tied to Performance
✔ If a student performs flawlessly, they gain an XP bonus or a free item unlock.
✔ If a student performs but forgets lines, they gain partial XP but suffer a timed penalty on their next assignment.
✔ If a student refuses to perform, they must complete an alternative written analysis instead.

✅ Why This Works:
• Connects literature to oral traditions & spoken performance.
• Encourages confidence, memory, and creative expression.
• Reinforces key themes of each literary movement.

📜 2. Weekly Boss Fights Now Tied to Art & Literary Eras

📜 Bosses are now directly tied to the historical & artistic movements of the week.

✔ Classical Era Bosses – Philosophers, tragic heroes, and gods.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 230 (chunk 230/555)
